hooks.command: python -c "import pathlib, subprocess; root = pathlib.Path(r'''$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR'''); runtime = root / '.agent/skills/common/scripts/team_info_runtime.py'; mode_file = root / '.dev-mode'; proc = subprocess.run(['python', str(runtime), 'worked-before-status'], text=True, capture_output=True); status = proc.stdout.strip() or 'unknown'; mode = mode_file.read_text(encoding='utf-8').strip() if mode_file.exists() else 'missing'; print(f'team-info startup check: worked-before={status}; dev-mode={mode}. If worked-before=new, read マニュアル/まずはこちらをお読みください.md first. Before creating new files/folders, show the current dev mode to the user. Do not change .gitignore unless the user explicitly asked.')"

TODAY=$(date +%Y-%m-%d); MARKER="$HOME/.claude/last-pull-date.txt"; LAST=$(cat "$MARKER" 2>/dev/null || echo ""); if [ "$TODAY" = "$LAST" ]; then exit 0; fi; git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" fetch origin 2>&1 && git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" pull --rebase 2>&1 && echo "$TODAY" > "$MARKER" && printf '{"systemMessage":"自動 /pull 完了（本日初回）"}' || printf '{"systemMessage":"⚠️ 自動 /pull 失敗 — 手動で pull してください"}'
hooks.statusMessage: 最新のコードを確認中...
